bundles.title: Garden Wedding Guest — Quiet Luxury
bundles.curatorNote: The olive slip anchors a warm, neutral-anchored palette kept tonal throughout. It sits at a polished cocktail register — refined without trying too hard — while gold jewelry and tan accessories lift the warmth for a daytime garden ceremony.

bundles.title: Modern Business Casual — Navy & Cream
bundles.curatorNote: A cool navy blazer plays hero over a cream shell and charcoal trouser — a disciplined neutral scheme that stays sharp from desk to dinner. Loafers and a structured tote keep it grounded.

bundles.title: Cocktail Party — Emerald, One Statement
bundles.curatorNote: One emerald slip does all the talking; black accessories and a single gold cuff stay deliberately quiet so the color reads as intentional, not loud. The whole look holds a precise cocktail formality.

bundles.title: Festival Golden Hour — Boho Maxi
bundles.curatorNote: A rust tiered maxi leads a head-to-toe warm palette; the felt hat echoes the brown accessories so the whole look glows at golden hour. Relaxed, sun-ready, unmistakably festival.

bundles.title: Minimalist Date Night — All Black, Done Right
bundles.curatorNote: A leather column skirt is the quiet hero of a monochrome look — a fine mock-neck, slingbacks, and a mini top-handle keep proportions lean and the formality dialed for dinner.

bundles.title: Sunday Athleisure — Clean & Tonal
bundles.curatorNote: Charcoal-on-black with one pair of clean grey runners as the lift — an effortless tonal athleisure set that works for the studio, errands, or a coffee run.

bundles.title: Summer Vacation — Linen & Straw
bundles.curatorNote: A cream linen shirt-dress keeps things cool and neutral while the straw tote brings the one warm accent. Breezy, easy, and built for heat — packs flat, looks pulled-together off the plane.

bundles.title: Summer Wedding — Linen-Suited Guest
bundles.curatorNote: An unstructured olive linen blazer is the statement; a white oxford and tan trouser keep the rest quiet and warm-toned. Suede loafers and a woven belt finish a look built for an outdoor ceremony — formal enough, never stiff.

bundles.title: Off-Duty Streetwear — Tonal & Easy
bundles.curatorNote: Grey retro runners are the hero against a charcoal hoodie and olive cargo — a low, casual register held together by a tight neutral-plus-one-accent palette. Modern and genuinely wearable every day.

bundles.title: The Interview — Navy Suit, No Mistakes
bundles.curatorNote: A navy suit, white shirt, and black cap-toe oxfords — the most reliably correct thing you can wear to an interview. Nothing competes for attention; the formality is uniform and unimpeachable.

bundles.title: Weekend Brunch — Smart Casual Layers
bundles.curatorNote: A brown corduroy overshirt is the warm hero over a cream tee and olive chino, grounded by minimalist leather sneakers. Easy earthy layering that reads considered without effort.

bundles.title: Winter Smart — Charcoal Overcoat
bundles.curatorNote: A charcoal overcoat leads a cold-weather palette warmed by one olive merino layer; flannel trousers and chelsea boots keep it sharp and seasonally honest. Built for actual winter, not just the look of it.

bundles.title: First-Timer Golf Starter Kit
bundles.curatorNote: Everything a new golfer needs in one coherent mid-tier set: a forgiving complete club set as the centerpiece, soft distance balls, a leather glove, spikeless shoes you can wear off the course, and the tees-and-marker odds-and-ends. No gaps, nothing to figure out.

bundles.title: Home Espresso Bar — The Real Setup
bundles.curatorNote: A proper home café in five pieces: the machine as centerpiece, a real burr grinder (where café-quality actually comes from), a precision scale, stoneware cups, and a fresh-bean subscription so you never run dry. Cohesive, complete, and built to last.

bundles.title: Focused WFH Desk Setup
bundles.curatorNote: A clean, dark-themed desk that covers the real needs: a 4K monitor anchor, a low-profile mechanical keyboard, an ergonomic mouse, a glare-free monitor light for evening work, and a felt-and-cork mat that ties the whole surface together.

bundles.title: Apartment Home Gym — No Excuses
bundles.curatorNote: A complete small-space gym: adjustable dumbbells replace a whole rack, plus a premium mat, resistance bands, one kettlebell, and a foam roller for recovery. Everything you need to train at home, nothing you don't.

bundles.title: Funeral — Respectful & Composed
bundles.curatorNote: A composed all-black look that asks nothing of anyone's attention: a crepe sheath, a tailored coat, leather flats, and a structured bag. Quiet, correct, and comfortable to stand in for a long day.

bundles.title: Graduation Day — Fresh & Polished
bundles.curatorNote: A white poplin dress under a cream cropped blazer reads bright and celebratory, while nude and tan accessories keep the warm neutral palette cohesive. Photographs beautifully and works under a gown.

bundles.title: First Date — Casual-Cool, Earthy
bundles.curatorNote: A suede trucker is the warm hero over a charcoal henley and dark denim, finished with suede chukkas that echo the jacket. Relaxed but considered — the rare first-date look that's neither try-hard nor sloppy.

bundles.title: Holiday Party — A Little Shine
bundles.curatorNote: One sequin cami brings all the sparkle; velvet wide trousers and black satin accessories keep everything else rich but restrained. Festive, grown-up, and proof that one shiny piece is plenty.

bundles.title: Quiet Luxury Capsule — Earth Tones
bundles.curatorNote: A pared-back earth-tone capsule built around cream, tan, and brown — the kind of restrained, tonal pieces that mix endlessly and never date. The quiet-luxury formula: few colors, good materials, zero logos.

bundles.title: All-Black Minimalist Wardrobe
bundles.curatorNote: A monochrome black foundation that proves restraint reads as polish. Each piece is a basic on its own and a complete look together — the most versatile four things in any minimalist closet.

bundles.title: Gift: The New Golfer (Under $700)
bundles.curatorNote: A no-guesswork gift for someone taking up the game: a forgiving complete club set, a leather glove, and the tees-and-marker kit. Everything to get them to the first tee, nothing they'll have to return.

bundles.title: Gift: Coffee Lover Upgrade
bundles.curatorNote: For the person who already loves coffee but drinks it pre-ground: the single biggest quality jump is a real burr grinder, paired with beautiful stoneware cups and fresh single-origin beans. A genuinely upgrade-y gift under budget.

bundles.title: Gift: The Home Office Refresh
bundles.curatorNote: A thoughtful desk refresh that's useful from day one: a glare-free monitor light, a premium felt-and-cork mat, and an ergonomic mouse. Practical, design-forward, and welcome on any desk.

_meta.note: Images are placeholders flagged for human replacement. Offers use PLACEHOLDER affiliate IDs via Sovrn. All published bundles validated through the coherence scorer (threshold 72).
